services.title: Office Cleaning
services.tagline: Professional Cleaning for Modern Australian Workspaces
services.overview: IFS delivers reliable, high-quality office cleaning services across Australia, tailored to suit corporate offices, shared workspaces, and professional environments. We focus on hygiene, presentation, and consistency while operating in full compliance with Australian WHS standards.
includes: Daily, weekly, or scheduled office cleaning
Dusting of furniture, fixtures, and fittings
Carpet vacuuming and hard floor mopping/polishing
Washroom cleaning, sanitisation, and consumable restocking
High-touch surface disinfection (door handles, switches, phones)

services.title: Retail Cleaning
services.tagline: Maintaining Immaculate Retail Spaces That Attract Customers
services.overview: We support Australian retail businesses by maintaining clean, safe, and visually appealing environments. Our team understands high foot-traffic demands and works around trading hours to minimise disruption.
includes: Floor cleaning for tiled, vinyl, and carpeted areas
Fitting room and customer area sanitisation
Flexible cleaning schedules (early morning / late night)

services.title: Education Facility Cleaning
services.tagline: Safe, Hygienic Cleaning for Schools & Educational Institutions
services.overview: IFS provides dependable cleaning services for Australian schools, colleges, and training facilities. We prioritise hygiene, safety, and consistency while working within school operational schedules.

services.title: Industrial Cleaning
services.tagline: Specialised Cleaning for Industrial & Operational Environments
services.overview: Our industrial cleaning services are designed for warehouses, factories, and operational sites across Australia. We follow strict WHS guidelines and use industry-approved equipment.

services.title: Commercial Cleaning
services.overview: IFS provides flexible, scalable cleaning services for commercial buildings, business centres, and mixed-use developments across Australia.

services.title: Entertainment & Venue Cleaning
services.overview: We provide professional cleaning services for entertainment venues, cinemas, event spaces, and hospitality environments, ensuring spaces are spotless before and after use.

services.title: Strata & Building Maintenance Cleaning
services.tagline: Reliable Cleaning for Strata & Multi-Unit Properties
services.overview: IFS specialises in strata cleaning services for apartment complexes and commercial buildings, supporting body corporates and strata managers across Australia.
includes: Car park sweeping and pressure cleaning

services.title: End of Lease & Move-Out Cleaning
services.tagline: Real Estate–Approved Cleaning for Stress-Free Handover
services.overview: Our end-of-lease cleaning services are designed to meet Australian real estate and property manager standards, helping tenants achieve a smooth inspection and bond return.
includes: Full kitchen deep cleaning (oven, stovetop, rangehood)

services.title: Pressure Washing & Exterior Cleaning
services.overview: Professional exterior cleaning services for residential and commercial properties, including pressure washing, soft washing, and sealing services.

categories.name: General Pressure Washing
items: Surface dirt, mould, algae, and grime removal

categories.name: Commercial Exterior Cleaning
items: Compliance with safety and access requirements

categories.name: Other Exterior Cleaning Services
items: Tailored cleaning plans to suit property needs
